framework.name: Security Incident Detection Service Provider Requirements (PDIS)
framework.name_nl: Referentiel d'exigences pour les prestataires de detection des incidents de securite (PDIS)
framework.issuing_body: Agence nationale de la securite des systemes d'information (ANSSI)
framework.scope: Qualification requirements for providers operating security operations centers (SOC) and incident detection services
framework.structure_description: Requirements covering organizational structure, detection capabilities, personnel competence, log collection, analysis, alerting, and service level commitments.

controls.title: SOC organizational structure
controls.description: The provider shall maintain a dedicated SOC with defined roles, escalation paths, and 24/7 availability for critical clients.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit maintenir un SOC dedie avec des roles definis, des chemins d'escalade et une disponibilite 24/7 pour les clients critiques.

controls.title: Service level agreements
controls.description: SLAs shall define detection time targets, notification delays, and coverage hours for each client.
controls.description_nl: Les SLA doivent definir les objectifs de temps de detection, les delais de notification et les heures de couverture pour chaque client.

controls.title: Segregation of client environments
controls.description: Client monitoring data shall be logically or physically segregated to prevent cross-contamination.
controls.description_nl: Les donnees de surveillance des clients doivent etre segreguees logiquement ou physiquement pour prevenir toute contamination croisee.

controls.title: SOC analyst competence
controls.description: SOC analysts shall demonstrate competence in log analysis, threat detection, and incident triage through certifications or equivalent experience.
controls.description_nl: Les analystes SOC doivent demontrer leur competence en analyse de journaux, detection de menaces et tri d'incidents par des certifications ou une experience equivalente.

controls.title: Threat intelligence skills
controls.title_nl: Competences en renseignement sur les menaces
controls.description: The detection team shall include personnel with threat intelligence capabilities to contextualize alerts.
controls.description_nl: L'equipe de detection doit inclure du personnel ayant des capacites en renseignement sur les menaces pour contextualiser les alertes.

controls.title: Log collection architecture
controls.description: The provider shall deploy a log collection architecture ensuring completeness, integrity, and confidentiality of collected events.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit deployer une architecture de collecte des journaux assurant la completude, l'integrite et la confidentialite des evenements collectes.

controls.title: Log source coverage
controls.description: Detection shall cover network equipment, servers, endpoints, authentication systems, and application logs at minimum.
controls.description_nl: La detection doit couvrir au minimum les equipements reseau, serveurs, postes de travail, systemes d'authentification et journaux applicatifs.

controls.title: Log integrity protection
controls.description: Collected logs shall be protected against tampering through timestamping, hashing, or write-once storage.
controls.description_nl: Les journaux collectes doivent etre proteges contre la falsification par horodatage, hachage ou stockage non-reecrivable.

controls.title: Detection rule management
controls.description: Detection rules shall be maintained, versioned, and regularly updated based on threat intelligence and incident lessons.
controls.description_nl: Les regles de detection doivent etre maintenues, versionnees et regulierement mises a jour en fonction du renseignement sur les menaces et des retours d'incidents.

controls.title: Behavioral anomaly detection
controls.description: The detection system shall include behavioral analysis capabilities beyond signature-based detection.
controls.description_nl: Le systeme de detection doit inclure des capacites d'analyse comportementale au-dela de la detection par signature.

controls.title: Correlation and enrichment
controls.description: Alerts shall be correlated across multiple sources and enriched with contextual information before analyst review.
controls.description_nl: Les alertes doivent etre correlees a travers plusieurs sources et enrichies d'informations contextuelles avant la revue par l'analyste.

controls.title: False positive management
controls.description: The provider shall maintain a process to identify, document, and reduce false positive rates while preserving detection coverage.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit maintenir un processus pour identifier, documenter et reduire les taux de faux positifs tout en preservant la couverture de detection.

controls.title: Alert notification procedures
controls.description: Confirmed security incidents shall be notified to the client within agreed timeframes using defined communication channels.
controls.description_nl: Les incidents de securite confirmes doivent etre notifies au client dans les delais convenus via les canaux de communication definis.

controls.title: Alert severity classification
controls.title_nl: Classification de la severite des alertes
controls.description: Alerts shall be classified by severity level with defined response expectations for each level.
controls.description_nl: Les alertes doivent etre classifiees par niveau de severite avec des attentes de reponse definies pour chaque niveau.

controls.title: SOC infrastructure security
controls.description: SOC infrastructure shall be hardened, monitored, and physically secured with access restricted to authorized personnel.
controls.description_nl: L'infrastructure du SOC doit etre durcie, surveillee et physiquement securisee avec un acces restreint au personnel autorise.

controls.title: SOC network isolation
controls.description: The SOC network shall be isolated from client production networks and general corporate networks.
controls.description_nl: Le reseau du SOC doit etre isole des reseaux de production des clients et des reseaux d'entreprise generaux.
